text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 3 

BENEFIT_PHASE 

LABEL: Benefit Phase of Part D Event 

DESCRIPTION: This is a CCW-derived field that indicates the benefit phase in which the prescription likely occurred. 
This is done by ordering the beneficiary's claims by their dates of service and then comparing the cost 
of those PDEs to the benefit structure for the beneficiary’s plan.
